arts.sum: Both St Mirren and Dundee were in the top six of the Scottish Premiership last season, with the fifth-placed Buddies aiming for back-to-back top-half finishes but the Dee languishing behind in ninth. ...

Both St Mirren and Dundee were in the top six of the Scottish Premiership last season, with the fifth-placed Buddies aiming for back-to-back top-half finishes but the Dee languishing behind in ninth. ...
